home.title: Open Source OAuth Server
home.subtitle: Deploy a secure OAuth2.0/OIDC authentication server on Cloudflare

oauth.title: OAuth2/OIDC
oauth.description: Full OAuth2.0 and OpenID Connect support with multiple grant types

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare Powered
cloudflare.description: Deployed on Cloudflare Workers for global edge performance

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Built-in DDoS protection, WAF, and automatic SSL certificates

moreFeatures.title: Features
moreFeatures.item1: User registration, login, and password reset
moreFeatures.item3: OAuth2 authorization code and client credentials flows

login.title: Login
login.passkeyEmailRequired: Enter your email first to use passkey sign-in

register.title: Create Account
register.accountTypeUserHint: User accounts can bind XMOJ and manage their own authorizations.
register.accountTypeMerchantHint: Merchant accounts can create and manage OAuth applications.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: This account is an administrator. Enter the system management console for users, apps, and audit operations.

user.emptyAuthorizations: You have not authorized any applications yet.

step1.title: Create an Application
step1.description: Register your first OAuth application to get started

step2.title: Get API Credentials
step2.description: Obtain your App ID and Secret for authentication

step3.title: Integrate with Your App
step3.description: Use our OAuth2 endpoints to authenticate users

dashboard.title: System Management
dashboard.subtitle: Administrators can view global stats and jump to critical management actions here.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.manageAppsHint: Review all applications and perform block or warning actions.
quickActions.pendingAppsHint: View apps and change requests that require approval.
quickActions.systemSettingsHint: Configure merchant registration and review policy.
quickActions.refreshStatsHint: Return to this page to refresh global statistics.
quickActions.accountSecurityHint: Update admin password and security settings.

pending.title: Pending Applications
pending.subtitle: List applications and change requests that need admin approval.
pending.emptyChanges: No change requests are pending review.

users.title: Account Management
users.subtitle: Administrators can disable or re-enable user accounts.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Control merchant registration and review workflow.
settings.allowMerchantRegistrationHint: When disabled, new merchant sign-ups are blocked on the register page.
settings.merchantReviewRequired: Require admin review for new merchants
settings.merchantReviewRequiredHint: When enabled, new merchant accounts stay pending until an admin approves them.

form.name: Application Name
form.redirectUrisHelp: Comma-separated list of allowed redirect URIs
form.selectScopeRequired: Please select at least one scope

detail.secretWarning: ⚠️ Keep your client secret secure. It should never be exposed in client-side code.
detail.secretNote: Note: For security, the full secret is only shown once during creation.
detail.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All tokens will be invalidated.

validation.title: Trusted Verification (Validated)
validation.contentPlaceholder: Briefly describe your app and include website/privacy policy links so admins can review it quickly.
validation.contentRequired: Please add a short verification note
validation.submissionNote: Change note (validated apps require review for every update)
validation.updatePendingReview: Your app is in trusted mode: this update was submitted for admin review

authorize.title: Authorization Request
authorize.requesting: is requesting access to your account
authorize.permissions: This application will be able to:
authorize.noPublisherPolicies: No policy links were provided by this publisher.
authorize.footer: By authorizing, you allow this application to access your data according to their terms of service.
authorize.merchantForbidden: Merchant accounts are not allowed to authorize user access. Please sign in with a user account.

scopes.xmoj_profile: Read your bound XMOJ account information

security.title: Account Security
security.subtitle: Manage your password and passkeys to strengthen account protection.
security.passwordHint: Use a strong password and update it regularly.
security.deviceVerificationHint: After revoking, this device will require passkey verification again on next sign-in or sensitive action.
security.deviceVerificationRevoked: This device verification status has been revoked

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.subtitle: Use your device's built-in security key, fingerprint, or face unlock to sign in.
passkeys.addPrompt: Enter a name for this passkey
passkeys.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this device's passkey?
passkeys.empty: You have not set up any passkeys yet.

authenticator.title: Authenticator App
authenticator.subtitle: Use time-based one-time codes as an alternative verification method alongside passkeys.
authenticator.setupFailed: Unable to start Authenticator App setup
authenticator.loadFailed: Unable to load Authenticator App status
authenticator.scanHint: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, 1Password, Bitwarden, or any compatible app, or enter the key manually.
authenticator.codeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
authenticator.disableConfirm: This will remove the current Authenticator App and all recovery codes. Continue?
authenticator.regeneratePrompt: Enter a current 6-digit Authenticator code, or enter a recovery code to regenerate recovery codes
authenticator.recoveryCodesHint: Save these recovery codes now. Each code can only be used once.

passkeyVerification.loginSubtitle: Your account has passkeys configured. Please complete device verification first.
passkeyVerification.authorizeSubtitle: This app authorization requires another identity check.
passkeyVerification.item1: Use one of your registered passkeys to confirm your identity.
passkeyVerification.item2: After verification, continue the current sign-in or authorization flow.
passkeyVerification.item3: If this is your device, complete the verification as normal.
passkeyVerification.emailRequired: Enter your account email before verifying
passkeyVerification.lostTotp: Lost access to your Authenticator App? Use a recovery code
passkeyVerification.totpItem1: Open your Authenticator App and enter the current 6-digit code
passkeyVerification.totpItem2: If you lose access to the device, you can verify with a recovery code
passkeyVerification.totpItem3: After verification, this device will be marked as trusted

sensitiveAction.title: Confirm sensitive action
sensitiveAction.chooseMethod: Choose which verification method to use.
sensitiveAction.totpMessage: Enter a current 6-digit Authenticator code, or enter a recovery code to approve this sensitive action.

deleteApp.title: Delete Application
deleteApp.message: Are you sure you want to delete this application? This action cannot be undone and will invalidate all tokens.

xmoj.title: XMOJ Account Binding
xmoj.onlyUserCanBind: Only user accounts can bind XMOJ.
xmoj.mobileBookmarkHint: Mobile device detected. Default switched to manual input; bookmark flow is less reliable on mobile.
xmoj.bookmarkStep1: Drag the button to your bookmarks bar, or copy the code and create a bookmark manually.
xmoj.bookmarkStep2: Sign in on xmoj.tech, then click the saved bookmark.
xmoj.bookmarkStep3: You will be redirected back, auto-filled, and binding will start automatically.
xmoj.bookmarkLoginRequired: Please sign in to XMOJ first!
xmoj.bookmarkHelp: Copy the bookmarklet, save it as a browser bookmark, run it on xmoj.tech after login, and paste the PHPSESSID here.
xmoj.profileCheckHint: Verification rule: AuthMaster requests profile.php with your PHPSESSID, reads user_id, and strictly compares it with the input username.
xmoj.autoFillDetected: Session callback detected. Username {{username}} has been auto-filled.
xmoj.unbindConfirm: Are you sure you want to unbind the XMOJ account? This will remove the current link.
xmoj.rebindHint: An XMOJ account is already bound. Unbind first to bind another account.
